title: Culver’s Coming to Auburndale
summary: Construction is underway on US 92 West for Auburndale’s newest Culver’s location. Opening date to be announced.

title: 500-Home Community Approved in Davenport
summary: A new residential community will feature single-family homes, amenities, and green spaces.

title: US 27 Interchange Project Moving Forward
summary: Major interchange improvements at US 27 and CR 546 will enhance safety and reduce congestion.

title: Holiday Inn Express Coming to Winter Haven
summary: A new 100-room hotel is planned near the Legoland area, with construction expected to begin soon.
